summary: Iteration 102: Post-Production (Phase A) and Localization (Phase B) Testing. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: PostProduction component renders correctly in Step 4 with video player, download links, and localization grid. EN localization shows green border/checkmark (complete). Settings language picker works inline without redirect to onboarding.

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option> - this is a React hydration warning from the music track select element, but doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: PostProduction.jsx: Component correctly implements data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
PostProduction.jsx: Localization grid shows 5 languages (EN, ES, FR, DE, IT) excluding original language (PT)
PostProduction.jsx: EN localization correctly shows green border when complete
Settings.jsx: Language picker panel (lines 307-330) works inline without redirect to onboarding
studio.py: post-production-status endpoint returns correct structure with phase, final_url, duration, has_narration, has_music
studio.py: localizations endpoint returns correct structure with localizations, statuses, final_videos, original_language
studio.py: post-produce endpoint correctly validates scene videos exist (returns 400 if none)
studio.py: localize endpoint correctly validates target language differs from original (returns 400 if same)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test project 864f3e7e0464
context_for_next_testing_agent: Post-production and localization features verified. Test project '864f3e7e0464' (Abraao e Isaac - Preview v5 Test) has completed post-production (PT) with 37s video including narration + music, and EN localization. Key flows: (1) DirectedStudio > search 'Preview v5' > click project > Step 4 (Result) > scroll to PostProduction panel, (2) Settings > click 'Idioma' > language picker opens inline with 6 languages. PostProduction panel has data-testid='post-production-panel', 'final-video-player', 'download-final-video', 'localize-{lang}-btn', 'download-{lang}-video'. Settings language picker has data-testid='language-picker-panel' and 'lang-option-{code}'.

backend_post_production_status.details: GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/post-production-status returns status with phase='complete', final_url, duration, has_narration, has_music

backend_localizations.details: GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/localizations returns localizations data, final_videos for PT and EN, statuses

backend_post_produce_validation.details: POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/post-produce returns 400 if no scene videos exist

backend_localize_validation.details: POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/localize returns 400 if target language same as original, 400 if no final video

frontend_post_production_panel.details: PostProduction component renders in Step 4 (Result) with video player, download links, and localization grid

frontend_localization_grid.details: Localization grid shows 5 languages (EN, ES, FR, DE, IT). EN has green border/checkmark since it's complete

frontend_final_video_metadata.details: Final video player shows correct metadata: 37s, Narração + Trilha (Narration + Music)

frontend_settings_language_picker.details: Settings language picker works inline with 6 languages (EN, PT, ES, FR, DE, IT), no redirect to onboarding

backend_tests.test_post_production_status_endpoint: PASS - Returns correct structure with status, narrations, voice_config
backend_tests.test_post_production_status_complete_fie: PASS - Has final_url, duration, has_narration, has_music
backend_tests.test_localizations_has_pt_and_en: PASS - Both PT and EN final videos present
backend_tests.test_localization_statuses: PASS - EN status is complete with final_url
backend_tests.test_localize_requires_final_video: PASS - Returns 400 for project without final video
backend_tests.test_project_status_has_outputs: PASS - Project has outputs including final videos
